name: fileSaverTool
description: fileSaverTool is a comprehensive file I/O tool for saving, reading, and listing files in the /app/outputs directory with proper formatting and content processing.

actions.name: save_results
actions.description: Save the Agent generated results to a file at path /app/outputs with the file name as generated by agent. The results could be a verilog code, python code, or any other text based file.

results.description: The results generated by the Agent. This should be a string containing the results to be saved.

file_name.description: The name of the file to save the results to. This should be a valid file name based on generated artifacts. For example for Verilog code, it could be 'design.v', for Python code it could be 'script.py'.
